args.message: The ad mentions this is a one-owner vehicle with complete service records. Can you confirm the one-owner claim, and what exactly do 'complete service records' entail? Are we talking detailed receipts from a dealership or independent shop, or something else? Also, has the car ever been in any accidents or had any body work done?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely! This Civic has been babied by a single, meticulous owner its whole life. And yes, 'complete service records' means we have all the documentation – regular oil changes, tire rotations, you name it, all performed at the dealership. We pride ourselves on transparency here! As for accidents or body work, nope, not a single incident to report. This beauty has a clean history and has never needed anything more than routine maintenance. You can really feel the difference when a car has been this well cared for.

args.message: The exterior is in fantastic shape for a 2016 model. You might find a tiny stone chip here or there, but nothing you wouldn't expect from normal highway driving – really, it's remarkably clean. The paint still has a brilliant shine. Inside, it's just as immaculate. The seats are plush, no rips or stains at all. The carpets are clean, and the headliner is perfect. This car has clearly been treated with the utmost care. You'll be hard-pressed to find any flaws!

args.message: Great questions! Safety and reliability are paramount, and I'm happy to report that the tires on this Civic have plenty of life left. We're talking about significant tread depth, easily good for tens of thousands of miles – certainly not something you need to worry about anytime soon. As for the brakes, they are also in excellent condition. They were inspected during the last service and are performing perfectly. We wouldn't let a car leave the lot if there were any concerns about tires or brakes, period.
